Our Services

Complete Financial Solutions

One trusted advisor for all your insurance, investment, and tax needs.

01
🏥
Health Insurance
  • Individual & Family Floater Plans
  • All major insurers — Star, Niva Bupa, HDFC Ergo, Care, SBI, Bajaj
  • Senior Citizen Health Plans
  • Critical Illness & Cancer Cover
  • Group Health Insurance
  • Top-Up & Super Top-Up Plans
  • Cashless across 10,000+ hospitals

02
🚗
Car Insurance
  • Comprehensive & Third-Party
  • All companies — ICICI Lombard, Bajaj, HDFC Ergo, New India, Tata AIG
  • Zero Depreciation Add-on
  • Engine Protect, Key Loss Cover
  • Roadside Assistance (RSA)
  • NCB Protection Cover
  • Instant policy issuance
💬 Enquire Now
03
🛡️
Life Insurance
  • Term Plans: LIC Tech Term, HDFC Life Click2Protect, ICICI iProtect Smart, Max Life Smart Secure
  • Endowment / Traditional: LIC Jeevan Anand, New Endowment, Money Back, Jeevan Labh
  • ULIP — Market-linked returns
  • Return of Premium Term Plans
  • Joint Life Policies
💬 Enquire Now
04
📈
Mutual Funds
  • SIP — Monthly goal-based wealth creation
  • SWP — Systematic Withdrawal for monthly income
  • Lump Sum — One-time investment in equity/debt
  • Step-Up SIP — Increase with income
  • Equity, Debt, Hybrid, ELSS (80C)
  • All AMCs — SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Nippon, Axis, Kotak, Mirae, DSP
💬 Enquire Now
05
🏛️
NPS & Pension Plans
  • NPS — National Pension System (Tier I & II)
  • Additional 50,000 deduction under 80CCD(1B)
  • Retirement corpus planning
  • Annuity & pension fund selection
  • LIC Jeevan Akshay, Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana
  • Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
💬 Enquire Now
06
📋
LIC Servicing
  • New LIC Policy Issuance
  • Premium Collection & Payment
  • Policy Revival (lapsed policies)
  • Loan Against LIC Policy
  • Maturity & Death Claim Assistance
  • Address / Nominee Change
  • Policy Status & Bond Retrieval
💬 Enquire Now
07
📊
Tax Planning & Filing
  • ITR Filing (Salaried, Business, Capital Gains)
  • Tax-saving investment planning (80C, 80D, 80CCD)
  • Form 16 reconciliation
  • Capital Gains computation & reporting
  • HRA, Home Loan interest deductions
  • New vs Old Tax Regime advisory
  • GST registration & filing support
  • Advance tax calculation
  • Tax notice handling support

About InfoApp.in

Your Trusted Financial Partner

InfoApp.in is led by Arpan Kumar Banerjee, an AMFI-certified mutual fund advisor, IRDAI-licensed insurance agent and PFRDA-certified pension expert with over 7 years of hands-on experience helping families across West Bengal make smart financial decisions.

We believe every rupee you earn deserves a purpose — whether it's protecting your family, building wealth, or planning for retirement. Our advice is always independent, transparent, and aligned with your goals.

As seen at the MoneyControl Mutual Fund Summit — we stay at the forefront of the financial advisory ecosystem.

🎯
Goal-Based Planning
Every plan mapped to your personal financial goals.
🔍
Independent Advice
No bias — we compare all providers for you.
📞
Claim Support
We handle paperwork during insurance claims.
🏆
